summary: Comprehensive testing of Zitex AI Agent feature. Backend: 12/13 tests passed (92%). Frontend: All key features working - auth, chat SSE streaming, tool calls, conversations sidebar. The AI Agent successfully uses tools like quran_reciter_lookup and returns real data.

minor.issue: Path traversal test returned 200 instead of 400/404 - but this is handled safely by ingress routing (returns frontend HTML, not actual file)

issues: Console shows repeated 'Error fetching stats: TypeError: Failed to fetch' - appears to be from a different component (not AI Agent), does not affect AI Agent functionality

critical_code_review_comments: AI Agent module correctly implements SSE streaming for chat responses
Tool registry properly includes build_website, update_website, generate_audio
Frontend AIAgent.js correctly reads token from localStorage key 'token' (not 'zitex_token')
Conversations list includes 'has_html' field as required
Preview endpoint returns HTML placeholder when no website built
Audio endpoint correctly returns 404 for missing files
Owner login redirects to /dashboard (not /admin) as expected
Hero CTA 'hero-ai-agent' on landing page routes to /ai-agent correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements present, chat flow works, tool events display)

context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Agent feature fully tested. Key findings: (1) POST /api/agent/chat SSE streaming works with tool calls - tested with 'list 3 quran reciters' query which triggered quran_reciter_lookup tool, (2) GET /api/agent/conversations returns list with has_html field, (3) GET /api/agent/conversation/{id} returns full transcript, (4) DELETE /api/agent/conversation/{id} works for owner, (5) GET /api/agent/conversation/{id}/preview returns HTML placeholder, (6) GET /api/agent/audio/{filename} returns 404 for missing files, (7) Tool registry has build_website, update_website, generate_audio, (8) Frontend /ai-agent requires auth (redirects to /login), (9) Model picker, new chat button, agent input, send button, example chips all present, (10) Chat flow works: user message appears, tool events display, AI response arrives

features_verified.backend_chat_sse: ✅ POST /api/agent/chat returns SSE stream with text, tool, saved events
features_verified.backend_tool_calls: ✅ Tool calls work - quran_reciter_lookup returned 20 reciters
features_verified.backend_conversations_list: ✅ GET /api/agent/conversations returns list with has_html field
features_verified.frontend_hero_cta: ✅ hero-ai-agent CTA on landing page routes to /ai-agent
features_verified.frontend_model_picker: ✅ Model picker present with GPT-4o and Claude options
features_verified.frontend_chat_flow: ✅ Message sent, tool event displayed, AI response received

mocked_apis.note: All integrations are live (OpenAI GPT-4o, ElevenLabs, Nano Banana via Emergent LLM Key)
